titleStmt.title: SII 22.370: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 370. (A.R. No. 370 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. MĒLAIKKŌYIL ROCK-CUT TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE CAVE SHRINE. TRIBH. RĀJARĀJADĒVA—5th YEAR

summary.p: This is much damaged. It records a gift of 96 sheep and 13 cows and also a lampstand for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirumēṟṟaliuḍaiya-Mahādēva at Tirunalakkuṉṟam by one Nūṟṟaṉ Periyāṉ alias Vīramaḻagiya-Paraiyaṉ a (military) follower of Śīrāḷaṉ Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Kaḍambarāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 5vatu
Iraṭṭapāṭi koṇṭa coḻavaḷa nāṭṭu kunṟiyūr nāṭṭut tirunalakkunṟa
ttu Uṭaiyār tirumeṟṟaḷi Uṭaiya mahādevaṟku c cirāḷaṉ peru
ḷāna kulottuṅkacoḻak kaṭamparāyaṉ Akampaṭi
mutali kaṭṭi nūṟṟan periyānāna viram Aḻakiyaparai(rai)yaneṉ vaitta ti
runantāviḷakku Onṟukku ko nāl ney Uḻakkukku viṭakkaṭava Āṭu toṇṇāṟṟāṟu
kku Ikkoyil civappirāmaṇar pāri cū ṟanum nāṟpatteṇṇā
yirak kūttan muṭivilāmutalum karumāṇi num cūṟṟi kunṟanum Ayyan
tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyānum varkku viṭṭa Āṭu nāṟpatte
ṭṭum pacu patinmunṟum yamākavum Ivviḷakkeriya
ṭam karu Uṭpaṭa Eṭai 5 10 tarāvāl viḷakku Onṟum kuṭutten
nūṟṟan periyānāna viramaḻakiya paraiyanen Itu palmaheśva
rar rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.370 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
